scripts.lint: tsc -b --pretty false && node ../scripts/check_frontend_source_hygiene.mjs src && node ../scripts/check_frontend_japanese_strings.mjs src
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run electron:compile && electron ../desktop/electron/dist/main.js"
scripts.electron:dev:compat: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run electron:compile && electron ../desktop/electron/dist/main.js --gpu-mode=compat-gpu-blocklist"
scripts.app:dev: concurrently -k "cd .. && python -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "npm run electron:dev"
scripts.app:dev:compat: concurrently -k "cd .. && python -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "npm run electron:dev:compat"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run icons:build && npm run electron:compile && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force electron-dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Recurse ../desktop/electron/dist electron-dist"
